summary: Iteration 130 - PDF Report Generation Feature Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tested features working correctly. New /api/pdf-report/generate endpoint generates valid PDFs for all analysis types (retirement, buffett, SOA, tax, compliance, insurance, trust, investment comparison, generic). VoiceAssistant result cards have hover-visible PDF download button. RetirementVoicePanel has dedicated PDF download button.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, charts still render

critical_code_review_comments: PDF Report Generator (/api/pdf-report/generate) correctly implements reportlab-based PDF generation for 9 analysis types
VoiceAssistant.jsx correctly implements hover-visible PDF download button (data-testid='download-pdf-btn') on result cards with opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100
RetirementVoicePanel.jsx correctly implements PDF download button (data-testid='retirement-download-pdf') that appears after analysis
PDF generation does NOT require LLM - works purely from JSON data provided
All PDF types return valid application/pdf content starting with %PDF-
test_credentials: No auth needed - all endpoints are open
seed_data_creation: None - used test payloads for PDF generation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 130 verified: (1) New /api/pdf-report/generate endpoint working for all 9 analysis types (retirement_analysis, buffett_analysis, soa_draft, tax_calculation, compliance_check, insurance_analysis, trust_strategy, investment_comparison, general), (2) PDFs are valid (start with %PDF-, correct content-type), (3) VoiceAssistant result cards have hover-visible PDF button, (4) RetirementVoicePanel has dedicated PDF download button after analysis, (5) Voice FAB present on all pages, (6) AdviceOS page renders with 5 tabs, (7) Navigation works correctly. NOTE: LLM budget may be low - voice-command/process may fail with budget exceeded (EXTERNAL issue, not code bug).
